species: We examined the dietary habits of contemporary and Middle to Late Holocene (ancient) populations of African softshell turtles (Trionyx triunguis) from the northern Levant...
tissue: A skin tissue sample was taken from the rear end of the carapace...
sample_source: Sampling of eight modern turtles was conducted from August 16th to 20th, 2021...
age: Radiocarbon dating and stratigraphy place this specimen to ca. 5–4.5 kya.
sex: Most sexed individuals were male (n = 5), with only two females.
